action.reasoning: Observation: DPRNN trained 10 epochs, val SI-SNR=-16.58. Previous custom models got PESQ~2.7 vs MetricGAN+ baseline=3.134. Analysis: Need to evaluate DPRNN and also try longer training. The MetricGAN+ baseline is hard to beat with generic SE models. Decision: Submit DPRNN eval, then train for 30 more epochs. Also prepare a predict.py that can handle DPRNN checkpoint type properly.
